title: ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DUMINGAG, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3454 / 57 OG No. 8, 1375 (February 20, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2826, June 19, 1960 ]

ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DUMINGAG, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
